name: MUD + Int5 MLP + BigramHash(10240) + SWA
blurb: Non-record: Replaces Muon's Newton-Schulz with MUD's triangular Gram preconditioning (arxiv:2603.17970). Strong convergence (1.1989 BPB in only 5,087 steps) but TRSM overhead makes it 4.5x slower per step on H100s vs Muon. Single seed, no statistical significance claim.
author: Anush
